parameters.text:
✏️ *Content Plan Editor*

To edit a post, send:
`Change <PostID> <your changes>`

*Examples:*
• `Change IMG-20260331-001 change topic to hair care tips`
• `Change CAR-20260401-001 make caption shorter, feature Deep Tissue Massage`
• `Change REL-20260402-001 change hook to a question style`

💡 You can find PostIDs in the schedule document sent earlier.

📌 *Tip:* Be specific about what you want changed — the AI will keep everything else the same.

=⏳ Processing your edit for {{ $('Parse Edit Command').item.json.postId }}...

_Reading existing data, applying your changes via AI, and updating the calendar._

additionalFields.caption:
✅ Post has been updated in the Content Calendar!

📋 See the attached report for a before/after comparison.
